items.a: starch recrystallization that contributes to staling

items.a: reduces shrinkage and keeps layers tender

items.q: Explain the culinary science concept: what curing salt does in preserved meats. (set 2)
items.a: helps inhibit pathogens and maintain color
items.explanation: Core explanation: helps inhibit pathogens and maintain color.

items.q: In food science, what best defines 'difference between stock and broth'?
items.a: stock is simmered from bones; broth is from meat and seasoning
options: stabilize cocoa butter crystals for gloss and snap
temperature at which fat begins to visibly smoke and degrade
allowing dough to rise before baking
stock is simmered from bones; broth is from meat and seasoning
items.explanation: This concept is defined as: stock is simmered from bones; broth is from meat and seasoning.
